strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple domains
Proven ability to own and deliver complex systems, including open-source GIS platforms and AI-agent tooling
Strong track record in DevOps, CI/CD, and infrastructure setup (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK)
concerns: Resume mislabels name as 'JAMES SMITH' but all content reflects 'Szabo Bogdan' — potential red flag for attention to detail
Primary professional experience is at senior/staff level, raising questions about fit for an entry-level role
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates deep fullstack expertise with TypeScript, React, and infrastructure tools aligned with the role, but their senior-level background and lack of German proficiency raise concerns about role fit and on-site collaboration, despite strong technical capabilities.
